individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with our college because it provides knowledge in rural areas.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered for our course was 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Honda, Subros, Escorts Limited, Hero MotoCorp, Tata Group, Maruti, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms were good. Our college provided labs for practicals. Workshops were with highly precious machines like lathes, milling, etc. Our college has a well-disciplined library. Our college had not provided a hostel facility, so many students used to live in nearby PGs. Our college had a canteen. Our college provided projectors for seminars.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of All Education & Research Point.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered was 3 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA. Top companies visited our college for interviews and selected intelligent students with the required percentage of their companies. Top recruiting companies were JCB, FEM, etc. Students got a chance to give interviews at top MNCs.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was available in our college. Trade labs were available in our college with all trade instruments for better understanding of students. Our college had a huge and well-structured library which contained all subjects and trade books. We used to submit books to the librarian after the semester.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Placements in our college are not very impressive.

content.Placements: The placement percentage is 69%. The highest package is 5.4 LPA and the lowest package is 1.10 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Sandan Vikas Pvt. Ltd. and Victora Tools.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi is not working properly, and the labs are not in proper condition. Sports are played in our college, and the canteen in our college is very unique.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are very loyal and very knowledgeable. They have the best quality of understanding students in any way, like sports and studies. They teach the students practicals, and the exams are not so difficult.
